articles.title: Masonic Hall, Nauvoo
articles.complete_text: MASONIC HALL, WHERE THE RELIEF SOCIETY WAS ORGANIZED IN 1842 BY THE PROPHET JOSEPH SMITH
articles.notes: This appears to be a photo caption rather than a full article. The image shows a two-story building with trees, and the caption identifies it as the Masonic Hall where the Relief Society was organized in 1842 by Prophet Joseph Smith. This is located at the bottom of page 159 in the PDF images.
